However, is good to stay here if you come in a big group as the room is spacious enough.

reviews.title: Satisfactory service
reviews.text: The corridor to the room was used as a store room, littered with toilet paper. The beds were okay, but the showers was broken, metal pieces of the shower drainage came out, water heater not working at times, taps were broken as well.. Didn't have clear instructions to open the safe, we had to keep our belongings in our bags.. Staff entered our room without prior notice.. I would say overall its a good place to crash, if you spend most of the time out of the hotel.. just keep your important belongings with you??

reviews.title: Nice Hotel, shame about the Noise
reviews.text:
Was not made aware of construction work next door when booking, despite it being ongoing for months and disruptive between 08:00 - 18:00 every day.
Staff eventually moved us to another hotel, which was no where near as good a spec as this one.
Should tell customers when booking that there is ongoing noise and give them the option to move if needed.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. 

  

We are sincerely sorry for the inconvenience caused by the construction noise from the neighboring building during your stay. We also regret that you were not informed about the ongoing work at the time of booking  this should have been communicated more clearly, and we fully understand your frustration. 

  

We are sorry that the alternative hotel we arranged for you did not meet the same standards, even though our intention was to minimize the disruption to your stay. Your comments are very important to us, and we are reviewing our communication process to ensure future guests are informed of any potential noise and given appropriate options in advance. 

  

Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in better circumstances.

reviews.title: Not bad
reviews.text:
We booked a tour through the hotel to Mekong that departed at 7.30am. We actually requested for morning call but there was no call waking us up. And the breakfast that should be prepared at 6.45am was not prepared yet. They even asked us to wait till 7.30am but we had to leave by that time. Thus we just simply grabbed something that is available by that time to eat. 
We missed the tour bus after ghost but the hotel sent us to the travel agency to catch up the bus. At least at the end we were able to join the tour to Mekong. Thanks to the hotel for that. 
One of the staff is very friendly and helpful by providing us any information that we needed. 
The cleanliness of the hotel consider ok. Quite comfy.
reviews.positives: One of the staff is very nice, helped us a lot in booking trip to Mekong delta. We can check in much more earlier than the actual time once they have empty room.

Other hotels offer more for the same price or less. Staff were pleasant and as helpful as they could be given their limited resources.

reviews.title: good hotel with inefficient front desk staff
reviews.text: Hotel location is good, rooms are big, cold AC and clean. Unfortunately, front desk service was terrible. We had confirmed airport pick up service thru miss anna for our family of 18 but the hotel pick up driver was no where in sight. Hotel driver left the airport because our flight was delayed. It is disappointing because we are travelling with kids. Once was an experience but to no avail the  same front desk staff miss anna again forgot to make arrangements for our airport transport on our departure inspite of prior reservation.  Poor endorsement and trouble shooting of anna and the 2 male front desk staff.  These three staff are such a disappointment for this hotel.

reviews.title: A25 Hotel Phó duc Chinh branch
reviews.text: Located along a not very busy or noisy street. However the letdown is the bland and boring room and amenities. Front office staff not exactly welcoming for local standards. Breakfast was at the basement and offered a range of local food of average standard. Don't expect any hospitality practices. Just eat and go and you will not be disappointed.
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We appreciate your comments regarding the room, amenities, and front desk service. We will take your observations into account to improve our facilities and guest experience. We are glad that you found the location peaceful and that you were able to enjoy the breakfast options. We hope to have the opportunity to provide a better experience on your next stay.

reviews.positives: It's a good little hotel for the price and situated only a 5-7 minute walk to Ben Thanh Market and lots of other eating places in that area.

reviews.title: The selectable breakfast is good!
reviews.text:
I was aware from reviews that the neighboring building was under construction, so I was prepared for the noise. (There is noise starting around 7:30. I do not recommend this for those sensitive to sounds.) 

The staff also seemed to be concerned about the noise, as I received a phone call after checking in asking if everything was okay in my room. 

I recommend the breakfast. There is a self-service salad, bread, fruits, and drinks, and you order the main dish. The dry noodle soup was particularly delicious. I was also happy that they made fried eggs for me on the second day. 

Ben Thanh Market and Takashimaya are within walking distance (about 10 minutes), making it convenient for sightseeing. 

If you ask at the front desk, you can borrow a scale, which was very helpful for adjusting the weight of my luggage for the return trip. They also offered to store my luggage after checkout.
reviews.response: A25ホテルをお選びいただき、またご意見を共有していただき、誠にありがとうございます。このたびのご滞在が快適なものとなったことを大変嬉しく思います。またお会いできる日を楽しみにしており、心を込めたおもてなしでお迎えできることを願っております。

reviews.title: Just for sleeping
reviews.text: During our stay there was construction going on at a space attached to the hotel. The drilling  continued until nearly 10pm. Latch on main door was broken. Still had the main door lock so I did not bother to change. Steep steps in case you're bringing luggage and had to stay on the floor with no elevator. Paid in full cause we did not want to leave all our passports with them. Was told to pay about 100k vnd more but did not say it was a deposit. If I did not mention it on the last day the staff would have kept quiet about it. But the lady manning the counter on the last day was not there when I checked in. And she was very polite and checked for us regarding the discrepancy. Walking diatance to Ben Thanh market and convenience stores. View facing other hotel units even though high floor. One of the bed was sunken in the middle so when 2 pax sleep both will roll to the centre ;/. Stained teapot. Hotel is good for sleeping and nothing else.

reviews.title: Good value at good location
reviews.text: Really enjoyable stay. Staff were brilliant and the hotel is in a really good location not far from both the market and the river. While no breakfast is offered there are good eating places in close proximity. The rooms are comfortable and great value for money. I hate it when people nit pick over small things such as soap or slow lifts and are only paying $US22 per night!!! This place has all you need in a good location, comfortable room and kind friendly staff. Highly recommended budget hotel with heaps of comfort.

reviews.title: Cozy Hotel :)
reviews.text:
We have early check in as requested with no extra charge. Room is ready early.  Outside of the hotel is simple yet inside is very comfortable rooms, quite big, with AC, CABLE TV channel,  toiletrries, water heater ,  with small fridge, with cabinet to hang your clothes, tables and nice chairs inside the room as well. Staffs are good  and friendly know how to speak english also very responsible-i ask them to wake us up since we have early flight--good job for doing so :) )  suggest to take a airport transfer from them as its cheaper 9usd/ 190,000dong. (Can email the hotel) there is daily cleaning of the room. Location is near many food eateries and 24 hours convinient stores. Ben thanh market and other tourist destination is walking distance only. They also offer a package tour- can ask receptionist. Overall good experience staying here. 

Just be careful. There is a cyclo ("
Cyclo Cross Bicycle") nearby offer a ride. They cheat and ask for more payment like 500,000 dong per person.

reviews.text: It's a bit awkward to get the right temperature on the showers. Especially on the upper floors. The rooms have nice furniture. The staff are really nice here and seem willing to help you with anything you need, I will probably come back just to hang out with the security guard Mr Binh. Well worth the money.

reviews.title: Great location and awesome staff!
reviews.text:
We were disappointed at first as the facade of the hotel us not pleasing. But the rooms are big and toilets are clean. Location is the best as it’s just a 10min walk to Ben Thanh Market. What’s most commendable was the staff, Anna, the receptionist, in particular. She helped us with lot of stuff like transpo, ordering food online, etc especially that we struggled due ti language barrier.
Will recommend this hotel if you are into saving your money for shopping, but not if you are more into hotel amenities you can find in 5-star hotels...

reviews.title: big clean rooms, limited hot...
reviews.positives: I liked that the rooms were big and clean.
reviews.negatives: Didn't like that there was no hot water at night.  They might have a solar water heater or something. Also didn't like that room smelled of smoke from someone obviously smoking in other room.

reviews.title: Does what it’s paid to do.
reviews.text: Close to the Ben Thành Market and many sites it’s in a good location. This is a small hotel with 3 rooms per floor laid out as follows. Room x01 is a large room with at least 2 beds at the back of the hotel. Fairly quiet. Room nx2 is smaller with 1 bed and no windows and is quite quiet. Room nx3 faces the Main Street and has large windows that can be opened if desired. Plenty of traffic noice, street vendors at all hours of the night. Nearby Karaoke till 2AM. During my stay they were demolishing a building across the street. Much of the noise was jackhammering during the evening and night as it’s cooler then. Continuously hammering away with manual tools, concrete saws etc. Try to get Rooms nx2 for the quietest stay. Minibar, kettle and AC in each room. Staff are friendly though make absolutely sure that any requests are understood. They have very laundry  service as well as limited menu room service till 10PM. I would stay again but only in a “core” room that had no windows.

reviews.title: Fabulous

reviews.title: Good enough

reviews.negatives: My credit card didn't work on booking (i don't know why because i used it many times before and after, on booking!!) so the hotel didnt get the guarantee BUT they didnt cancel our reservation ...

reviews.title: Satisfied customer
reviews.text: Ive booked 4 rooms for my first visit to HCM just by location and review. Technically we were just looking for a place to sleep since we intend to tour the place most of the time but surprisingly the hotel could provide us with more. Laundry services and even booked a muslim tour for us. For a budget hotel! That surprise me. They even provide full toiletries. Could'nt ask for more for the price we pay.

reviews.title: Clean, good location and friendly staff
reviews.text:
Stayed in a double room. 
Location was good and about 10 mins walk from market and backpackers strip. Very clean and great bathroom, however did have a bit of a smell come from it, extractor fan took care of this. Air con, tv great and wifi also were good. Was really only a room for sleeping in though. Didn't have a window but only booked the cheapest room, would pay a little extra for this. Quite stay and friendly staff who were very helpful.

reviews.negatives: The hotel shares an external wall with a bar/disco and it can be very loud on certain nights of the week. I stayed a week and with 30 cent earplugs, the music wasn't a problem. The room could ...

reviews.title: A Decent Place To Stay For Families And Friends.
reviews.text: A Great Place To Stay With Family And Friends. Place For Traveller Who Dont Really stay most of the time in Hotels. Hotel is for sleeping etc. I Stayed At The Junior Suite. The Room Are Pretty Big. *For Singaporean, The Size Is Like A 3Room HDB Living Room. =). The Staff Greeted Us Well, Give Us Map and highlight all the good places to shop etc around that area. Ive Got No Complain About The Hotel. The only thing is, we do have a lil communication problem. Not All The Time. So i suggest that you take a piece of paper and write wateva you wanna say and show it to them. Ok thats all. Enjoy.

But otherwise very, very clean and comfortable. Very nice staff.

Breakfast was nice, the security at the front was super friendly too. Overall I had a nice stay here

reviews.text: I usually don't have the opportunity to travel far, so I often go for weekend getaways in the city. The A25 branches are located in very convenient positions for commuting. Close to the center and near parks. Regarding the service, I have already mentioned enough in previous comments. Absolutely satisfied.
reviews.response: Chúng tôi muốn nhân cơ hội này cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn A25 Hotel và chia sẻ trải nghiệm của bạn với chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng bạn đã có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị với A25 Hotel trong chuyến đi này. Rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón bạn quay trở lại để chúng tôi có thể phục vụ bạn với tất cả sự hiếu khách của mình.

reviews.title: 10 points for quality

I often take a break on weekends with my family in the city when there's no time for a long trip. A25 is always the top choice.  
The central location makes it convenient to get to entertainment and dining spots.  
It has all the amenities of home. Nothing is lacking.  
Lately, they even have fresh fruit available in the room, which is wonderful.

reviews.title: Wonderful – Reasonable price, attentive service!
reviews.text:
I had a very satisfying vacation at the hotel. The prices are reasonable compared to the quality of service provided. The room was clean, fully equipped, and I was particularly impressed with the presence of an iron and ironing board – this is very convenient for those who need to look presentable when on business trips or attending events.

The breakfast was delicious, varied, and beautifully presented. The mini-bar in the room was also a big plus, allowing me to relax after a long day.

In particular, the staff's service attitude was very friendly and professional, always ready to assist when needed.

I will definitely return and am also willing to recommend this hotel to my friends and family!
reviews.response: Chúng tôi muốn nhân cơ hội này cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn A25 Hotel và chia sẻ trải nghiệm của bạn với chúng tôi. Para una noche que es lo que estuve... Todo muy bien. No opino del desayuno. No tome

reviews.title: bon hôtel
reviews.text: Très bon hôtel , très bien situé ... Qui aurait mérité un séjour plus long
reviews.response: Nous souhaitons profiter de cette occasion pour vous remercier d’avoir choisi l’hôtel A25 et d’avoir partagé vos impressions avec nous. Nous sommes ravis d’apprendre que vous avez passé un agréable séjour parmi nous. Nous espérons avoir le plaisir de vous accueillir à nouveau afin de vous offrir notre meilleure hospitalité.

reviews.title: Comfortable and lovely stay
reviews.positives: The hotel staffs were really friendly and helpful during my stay with my family at the hotel. They've also upgraded our room to provide us with more comfort during our stay. The room was spacious ...
reviews.negatives: The bathroom sink was clogged as the water from the sink took a long time to go down .

reviews.title: Très bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.text: Très bon rapport qui a été pris. Nous avions eu un petit pépin avec la lumière et l’air climatisé et ils nous ont changé de chambre tout de suite. L’emplacement était très propre, le personnel, super gentil et serviable. La nourriture était très bonne pour le déjeuner c’est fait au fur et à mesure. Par une cuisinière qui est présente sur place.
reviews.response: Nous souhaitons profiter de cette occasion pour vous remercier d'avoir choisi l'hôtel A25 et d'avoir partagé votre expérience avec nous. Nous sommes ravis d'apprendre que vous avez passé un agréable séjour à l'hôtel A25 lors de ce voyage. Nous espérons avoir l'opportunité de vous accueillir à nouveau afin de pouvoir vous offrir toute notre hospitalité.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Worth for staying. Near to city. Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Laut. Kaltes Wasser nicht regelbar. Kein WIFI auf dem Zimmer. Kein Raucherbereich. War aber gebucht
reviews.text: Trotz wiederholter Bitte das Wasser wärmer zu stellen wurde es nicht geändert. Das System ist eigentlich einstellbar aber der Regler wurde entfernt bei Dusche und Waschbecken. Ausschlafen oder am Tag im Zimmer unmöglich. Ab 7:00 gingen die Presslufthammer bis abends um 6. WIFI eine Katastrophe. Geht nur im Empfangsbereich obwohl jedes Stockwerk verdrahtet ist. Keine Gäste erlaubt auf dem Zimmer. Anscheinend werden in jedem Stock die Zimmer neu gemacht. 4 Zimmer pro Stock 2 vermietet zwei modernisiert. Dadurch Schmutzig und dreckig. Viel Staub. Raucher Zimmer gebucht ist aber komplett Nichtraucher. Es gibt auch keinen Raucher Bereich. Man muss raus auf die Straße. Da hilft das netteste Lächeln nicht. Unverschämt sowas überhaupt anzubieten

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Friendly staffs and helpful
reviews.negatives: Nothing to complain

reviews.title: Nice position to visit this...
reviews.positives: We like the position for tour this city. It's very close to market! We can try local food here easily. The hotel place not too quiet but very convenient to go anyplace. Thanks boss hotel.

reviews.title: Entspannter Aufenthalt bei nettem Personal
reviews.positives: Lage, service und neue Zimmer

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.positives: Great staff. Really took care of us and were so friendly. Always were there if you needed them for anything and always smiling. Definitely a great place to stay. Only two mins from the markets and 10 ...

reviews.title: Sehr guter Service, rundum zufrieden
reviews.text: Wir waren sehr zufrieden, sauberes Zimmer, beim frühstück wird frisch gekocht für jede Person und das Personal war stets zuvorkommend und freundlich
reviews.response: Wir möchten diese Gelegenheit nutzen, um Ihnen dafür zu danken, dass Sie sich für das A25 Hotel entschieden und Ihr Feedback mit uns geteilt haben. Wir freuen uns, dass Sie bei dieser Reise einen angenehmen Aufenthalt bei uns hatten. Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie bald wieder begrüßen zu dürfen, um Ihnen unsere volle Gastfreundschaft zu bieten.

reviews.title: friendly and helpful staff.. great...
reviews.positives: friendly and helpful staff.. great location, very near the shopping area different establishments like restaurants, money changer, etc..

reviews.title: Service
reviews.text: We hadden extra vragen over was, overzetting boeking ander hotel en taxi mogelijkheden. Alles werd volledig naar onze behoefte beantwoord. Goede service
reviews.response: Hartelijk dank voor uw feedback. We zijn verheugd te horen dat al uw vragen over het wassen, het overboeken naar een ander hotel en de taximogelijkheden volledig naar wens zijn beantwoord. We streven ernaar onze gasten altijd de best mogelijke service te bieden en hopen u in de toekomst weer te mogen verwelkomen.

reviews.title: Would stay here again
reviews.positives: Big rooms comfortable bed within walking distance to most things but a lot quieter than other parts of district 1 lots of good eateries close by staff are friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: 星相応のホテル
reviews.text:
セーフティーボックスが壊れていて、修理に来てもらった。しかし、老朽化しているのか、使いづらかった。
部屋の鍵を毎回預けて、入室するにも人を呼ばないといけないので面倒。
全体的に老朽化している印象。ショートステイで使うのなら我慢できるレベル。

Very friendly and helpful staff. Nice room and great location. Close to Ben Thanh Market and amazing food nearby :-)

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: They closed their cafe so breakfast was not served. That is the only downpoint however, the hotel is near to a cafe/convenient store.

reviews.title: コスパに長けている。
reviews.text:
コスト面で見つけて滞在いしました。
部屋の作りは所々チープさが隠せませんが、
コスト以上の清潔感とスタッフの対応が有ります
reviews.positives: スタッフの対応、清潔感、立地

reviews.title: I'll be there on the...

reviews.title: コストパフォーマンスがいいです
reviews.text: ホーチミン滞在の際はよく利用しています。寝るだけのホテルとしては問題ないです。道路側の部屋は隣のビルのカラオケの音が少し気になりますが、24時には静かになります。近隣には一人で食事できるところが沢山あります。コンビニも近くにあります。スタッフはちゃんと仕事してます。この価格帯のホテルでは比較的対応はいいと思います。
